Desc : Engie knew how hard this time of the month always seemed to be for his darling boyfriend. He hated it.

For all the tech in the world he could make, he was at a loss on what to do for his partner when he starts wailing about the cramps and the stomach pain. He knew how to handle his own periods, but his angel's? It absolutely kills him. So what better to do when his partner starts his period so close to valentine's day than grab some chocolates, a heating pad, some refreshing drinks and an assortment of movies?

Of course, It's all up to his lover to guide the night! It's his comfort afterall!
